zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Fiennes於1278年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯時，他的父親Guillaume de Fiennes II39歲，母親Blanche de Brienne32歲。他於1300年與Isabelle de Dampierre在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月18日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Fiennes was born in 1278, in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Guillaume de Fiennes II, was 39 and his mother, Blanche de Brienne, was 32. He married Isabelle de Dampierre in 1300, in Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 July 1333, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Fiennes est né en 1278, à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume de Fiennes II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Brienne, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Dampierre en 1300, à Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1333, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

Er hat 1300 in Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Isabelle de Dampierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Juli 1333 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Fra: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 루플랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Fiennes(이)가 1278년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Fiennes II(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Brienne(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1300년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드에서 Isabelle de Dampierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 18일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Fiennes nasceu em 1278, em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Fiennes II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Brienne, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Dampierre em 1300, em Nord, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1333, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.Louplande, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Fra: лоупланд, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Fiennes родился в 1278 г. в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Fiennes II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Brienne, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Dampierre в 1300 г. в местности норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 июля 1333 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Isabelle de Dampierre en 1300, en Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de julio de 1333, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
